programmes.show_description: After meeting in a sober living environment, two women decide to become roommates and fight over rent, damaged property and an expensive bed. S18, Ep237
Half-brothers fight over the cost of a funeral, heavy drinking in Las Vegas and dental work as a result of a fight. S18, Ep238
Blood stain removal and vet bills are disputed when a Pit Bull, described as 'gentle' by his owner, allegedly attacks a woman's Pomeranian. S18, Ep239
As a good deed, a woman takes in her nephew's homeless friend who turns out to be more than she bargained for. S22, Ep68
After a break-up, a woman claims her ex-lover offered to pay all of her moving expenses from Texas to Minnesota. S22, Ep69
When a man decides to hang out with friends instead of his live-in lover, their relationship comes to an abrupt end; she accuses him of vandalizing her car. S22, Ep70
A married couple and their four children are accused of trashing a family member's house after an eight-year rental. S22, Ep71
A woman sues her business partner for the value of her pants inventory; her partner says she did all the work. S22, Ep72
A woman sues her stepdaughter for the return of her Pomeranian puppy because she fears the animal is being abused. S22, Ep73
A man accuses his Ex girlfriend of purposefully breaking his TV during an argument; she says she was mad that he ate fast food that allegedly upsets his stomach. S22, Ep74
After allegedly playing beer pong violently, an intoxicated man is kicked out of a party; his friend claims he pitched a drunken fit and punched and kicked her car. S16, Ep43
Celeste Beard Johnson hit the jackpot when she met Steven Beard. When Steven is shot, ballistics lead police to the killer - Tracey Tarlton - Celeste's secret lover. S2, Ep1
When fire engulfs a brand new boat, two men battle to launch a life raft. S1, Ep9/15
Motorists struggle to save a woman trapped in her crashed car. S1, Ep10/15
Innovative, value-for-money products brought directly to you at home. Shop 'til you drop whilst avoiding the hustle and bustle of the High Street.
A man makes the mistake of adding his lover to the deed on his house; she claims he threatened to kill her. S22, Ep40
An Uber driver claims a mother/daughter duo took a pick axe to her car; the daughter says she was sucker-punched by the driver. S22, Ep41
A woman gets a deal on a paint job then sues the contractor for an allegedly shoddy job, mental anguish and legal fees. S22, Ep42
A motorist is accused of tracking down a biker that annoyed him and tackling him into a moving car. S22, Ep43
A mum stays at home to care for five children all under the age of four; a heated dispute between her husband and his mum makes matters worse. S24, Ep173
When a Slovakian woman's Visa application is denied, she sues small business owners for allegedly scamming her with a thousand-dollar application process. S24, Ep174
A short-lived romance ends with a woman receiving a $2,900 car from her lover the same month she breaks up with him. S24, Ep175
When an electricity bill reaches the thousands, an engaged gay couple take a family member to court; the foreclosed home goes up in smoke. S24, Ep176
A property on the border of Mexico is at the heart of a tenant/landlord dispute in which marijuana, vandalism and water rights come into play. S18, Ep240
Feuding cousins sue each other over an 'illegal' car repossession. S18, Ep241
Childhood friends reunite after years apart only to end up fighting over a car. S18, Ep242
A mother and daughter fight over damages to a rental property after alleged rashes, asthma and disabilities come into play. S22, Ep75
When a single father backs out of a family trip with his new girlfriend, she comes after him for payback. S22, Ep76
A woman takes in a homeless coworker whom she claims destroyed her home with his dogs; he says it was her six cats that did the damage. S22, Ep77
When a frightened 6-year-old claims to have spotted a snake in his home, he and his mother move out and sue for damages. S22, Ep78
A young woman moves in with her employer whom she later accuses of vandalizing her car; her employer says she stole from her family. S22, Ep79
After meeting in a homeless shelter, ex-roommates fight over alleged vandalism and highly suspicious CPS reports. S22, Ep80
Parents of two children fight over alleged vehicle vandalism, bleached clothes and a car crash. S22, Ep81

Raneem Oudeh from the UK learned her husband was already married. Facing threats, she called 999 for help, leading to a tragic end and a manhunt. S1, Ep9
Samira was a fashion model in Paris when she met Adam Frasch. In 2014, Samira's handyman arrives to their home and is horrified to find Samira dead in the family pool. S1, Ep9
During a bitter cold winter in San Angelo, Texas, a beloved father and military man vanishes without a trace. S3, Ep12
...Accident? The tragic case of John Chipp who was thrown 85ft to his death after a night out in Sunderland celebrating his 18th birthday. S1, Ep10
Susan Eads is found murdered in Texas in 1983. Decades later, can modern forensics finally find the perpetrator? S5, Ep12

A seven-year-old girl is swallowed up by the ground. S1, Ep11/15
A TV cameraman's parachute opens too late to prevent him hitting a mountainside. S1, Ep12/15

An ex-convict claims that while he served time his girlfriend stole from his bank account; she claims the money was spent on him. S22, Ep47
An altercation on St. Patrick's Day leads to a man allegedly spitting on a woman's car window; Judge Judy tracks down his accomplices. S22, Ep48
A dog sitter makes an ill-fated decision to visit a locale with an allegedly dangerous large dog; a bruised spine and over 7k in vet bills soon follow. S22, Ep49
A man claims he was bleeding profusely after an alleged attack by a pit bull whose owner claims it would never hurt anyone. S22, Ep50
A man openly admits he doesn't pay taxes and sues a former friend for the return of property and for allegedly filing a false police report. S24, Ep177
A wild party leaves a vacation rental in shambles after an intended group of 8 turns into a 'caught on video' gang of 30 partygoers. S24, Ep178
Even though puppies look exactly like their dog, a mother and son deny that their pet was responsible and sue neighbours for an alleged attack. S24, Ep179
Judge Judy advises a father to appeal any grievances against previous judges, as he takes on the mother of his teenager over child support. S24, Ep180
Only two days after buying a used car, the new owner says the brake pads fell off when he put it in reverse; he is sued for the unpaid balance. S18, Ep243
Alleged drug use, restraining orders and stolen property are disputed when ex-roommates sue each other. S18, Ep244
A woman sues a married couple for the return of money for a used car they sold to her; a phone with text evidence is allegedly destroyed. S18, Ep245
A man admits he is delinquent on his property taxes but claims that has nothing to do with water damage allegedly caused by his commercial neighbour. S22, Ep82
A woman accused of racking up over 7K in charges on her boyfriend's debit card is also accused of fraud related to her 96-year-old grandmother. S22, Ep83
A man claims he was attacked by the repo man when his car was being towed; both men call the police on each other. S22, Ep84
An ongoing feud involving bad credit and an expensive car divides sisters; an unassuming friend comes along for the ride. S22, Ep85
A man saves thousands in a lock box to be given to his roommate after he dies; his sister's allegedly covert `opening? of the safe is called into question. S22, Ep86
A man says he was trying to stop a car from running him down by pounding on the hood of the oncoming vehicle. S22, Ep87
A woman sues her ex-boyfriend's mother for the return of money paid for a car; an alleged assault and child support come into play. S22, Ep88

After a woman is sideswiped by a fellow motorist, she is allegedly caught on tape bashing the windows and slashing the tyres of the other car involved. S24, Ep196
In 1998, Scottish entrepreneur Nat Fraser's odd behaviour raises suspicion when his wife Arlene vanishes. Police suspect him but need evidence. S1, Ep10
Makeva Jenkins was shot in the head by a masked intruder while asleep in 2017. Her brother's 911 call launched an investigation into a financially motivated crime. S1, Ep10
Family of Sheila Bonge suspect foul play when she vanishes days after Christmas during the worst winter weather Michigan has seen in 20 years. S3, Ep13
